title: viola × marylandica
intro: Viola × marylandica, also known as the Maryland viola or variable viola, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the violet family (Violaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Viola × marylandica include relief from digestive problems, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Viola × marylandica can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile and accessible remedy in natural medicine.
